name: World Chronology Spine
append_only_rule: Later events are added as consequences, corrections, or branch results; they do not silently erase older records.

eras.event: Primordial Unity bisects the astral sky and creates the Material Planet.
The gods operate in relative congruence over early ages of the world.
Mega-Terozash breaches the Material Planet, creating the Doomsday / First Sieve / Five Days of Chaos.
Elemental essences are stabilized into visible realm-bodies: the elemental planets.
Doom scars, Mother Storm, Umbra, and Limbo become lasting structural consequences.
Public-facing pantheon memory preserves the Remeny-killed-Vonalzo account.
Corrective divine layer reveals Vonalzo/Twyll deception, seed absorption, and Speaker-memory manipulation.
House Mal declines, is economically displaced, and loses effective governing rank.
The Union rises as the sanctioned guild-governed successor trade order within the Principalities.
prior_release formalizes constitutional canon, contradiction governance, and regime transition objects as baseline repository law.
